title: Fix inventory page: restore add and upload functionality

requirements.summary: Restore full functionality of the Inventory page so users can add new items via the add dialog and upload items via Excel import
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Add Item' dialog opens and successfully submits a new inventory item without errors.
The Excel import/upload functionality works correctly and adds items to the inventory.
Existing inventory items are still displayed correctly.
No console errors appear when opening the inventory page, the add dialog, or triggering the upload flow.

file_operations.description: Debug and fix the add item dialog functionality to ensure it correctly validates and submits new inventory items using the addInventoryItem backend method. Verify that the form state management, validation logic, and mutation hooks are working correctly. Ensure the dialog opens, fields are editable, and submission triggers the backend call without errors.

Debug and fix the Excel import/upload functionality to ensure it correctly parses uploaded .xlsx files using the xlsx.ts utility, validates the data structure, and adds items to inventory via the addInventoryItem backend method. Verify that file selection triggers parsing, error handling displays meaningful messages, and successful uploads refresh the inventory list.

Verify that the addInventoryItem mutation hook is correctly configured with proper error handling, query invalidation after success, and toast notifications. Ensure the mutation accepts all required parameters (id, name, sellingPrice, purchasePrice, quantity, kind) and matches the backend interface signature.
